YOUTUBE VIDEOS
BUSINESS1
Teams formed to inspect 6 CNG pumps across district / जिले भर में 6 सीएनजी पंपों का निरीक्षण करने के लिए टीमें गठित
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
अधिकारियों ने जिले भर में छह सीएनजी पंपों की सुरक्षा और अनुपालन सुनिश्चित करने के लिए निरीक्षण टीमें गठित की हैं। ये निरीक्षण दुर्घटनाओं को रोकने और ईंधन स्टेशनों के उचित कार्य को बनाए रखने का लक्ष्य रखते हैं।
EDUCATION4
BREAKINGNEET scam sparks protest in Bilaspur demanding education minister's removal / नीट घोटाले पर बिलासपुर में प्रदर्शन, शिक्षा मंत्री हटाओ के नारे
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
Students and activists gathered in Bilaspur to protest the NEET paper leak, demanding justice and the removal of the Education Minister. The demonstration highlighted growing public anger over alleged central government mishandling.
BREAKINGNDA backs Modi's swift action on NEET paper leak / एनडीए ने नीट पेपर लीक पर मोदी के त्वरित कदम का समर्थन किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
The NDA has endorsed Prime Minister Modi's firm stance on the NEET exam paper leak, urging swift action. The support underscores the government's commitment to ensuring exam integrity.
Horticulture College at Katol approved / कटोल में बागवानी महाविद्यालय को मंजूरी
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
सरकार ने कटोल में बागवानी महाविद्यालय की स्थापना को मंजूरी दे दी है, जिसका उद्देश्य कृषि शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देना है। यह पहल स्थानीय किसानों को विशेष प्रशिक्षण प्रदान करेगी और उनके समर्थन में मदद करेगी।
Class 11 Lateral Entry Exam Results Announced / ओबीसी गर्ल्स रेजिडेंशियल स्कूल में प्रवेश परीक्षा का परिणाम घोषित
District Administration Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
The District Administration of Bilaspur has released the results of the lateral entry examination held on 19 July 2026 for Class 11 at the OBC Girls’ Residential School. Candidates can check their scores on the official website. The announcement marks a key step for admissions.
EVENT3
Heavy rains trigger yellow alert in Bilaspur and other districts / प्रदेश में भारी बारिश, बिलासपुर समेत कई जिलों में येलो अलर्ट
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
Intense monsoon rains have hit Chhattisgarh, prompting a yellow alert for Bilaspur and surrounding districts. The downpour is expected to continue for the next five days, affecting travel and daily life. Authorities have issued warnings and prepared relief measures.
Relentless rains lash city, 62.3 mm in last 36 hrs / शहर में लगातार बारिश, पिछले 36 घंटों में 62.3 मिमी वर्षा
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
भारी बारिश ने शहर को अपनी चपेट में ले लिया है, पिछले 36 घंटों में 62.3 मिमी वर्षा दर्ज की गई है, जिससे जलभराव और व्यवधान पैदा हुआ है। अधिकारियों ने निवासियों को चेतावनी जारी की है और उन्हें निचले इलाकों से बचने के लिए कहा है।
Spain dethrones King Messi 1-0 / स्पेन ने मेसी को 1-0 से हराया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
In a thrilling match, Spain secured a 1-0 victory over Lionel Messi's team, ending his reign as king of the pitch. The win marked a historic moment for Spanish football, celebrating an underdog triumph.
GOVERNMENT27
BREAKINGOyo hotel raided, illegal warehouse seized, agriculture dept questioned / ओयो होटल में अवैध भंडारण, कृषि विभाग पर सवाल
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 04:58:45
A raid on Golden Stay Oyo hotel in Bilaspur uncovered a large illegal warehouse of agricultural chemicals, leading to seizure and raising questions about the agriculture department's oversight. Authorities are investigating the link between the hotel and illegal storage.
Normal disagreement not mental cruelty: High Court dismisses husband's divorce plea / सामान्य असहमति मानसिक क्रूरता नहीं, हाई कोर्ट ने पति की तलाक याचिका खारिज की
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
The High Court ruled that ordinary marital disagreements do not constitute mental cruelty, dismissing a husband's divorce petition. The judgment clarifies the legal threshold for claiming mental cruelty in divorce cases.
BREAKINGRoad accident scourge claims 6967 lives in a year; High Court rebukes collectors / सड़क पर मंडरा रहा काल, एक साल में 6967 मौत, हाई कोर्ट ने कलेक्टर्स को फटकार
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
A recent report shows 6,967 road fatalities in the state over the past year, prompting the High Court to reprimand district collectors for inadequate safety measures. The court urged urgent action to curb the rising road toll.
BREAKINGCabinet meeting begins under CM Vishnu Deo Sai / मुख्यमंत्री विष्णु देव साय की अध्यक्षता में मंत्रिपरिषद की बैठक शुरू
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
The cabinet meeting chaired by Chhattisgarh Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai has started at Mahanadi Bhawan, where several key decisions will be discussed. It marks the new government's first major deliberative session.
BREAKINGChhattisgarh High Court: married daughter entitled to compassionate appointment / छत्तीसगढ़ हाई कोर्ट का फैसला : विवाहित बेटी भी अनुकंपा नियुक्ति की हकदार
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
The Chhattisgarh High Court ruled that a married daughter is not 'parai' and is eligible for compassionate appointment, setting a historic legal precedent.
BREAKINGSmart toilet locked, cafe open, women forced to defecate in open / बिलासपुर में स्मार्ट शौचालय पर ताला, कैफे धड़ल्ले से चालू
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
The new smart toilet in Bilaspur remains locked while a nearby cafe operates, leaving women with no choice but to defecate in the open. Residents demand immediate repairs and proper management of public sanitation facilities.
BREAKINGSnakebite scam expands, ADM, tehsildar targeted after officials jailed / बिलासपुर के सर्पदंश मुआवजा घोटाले में ADM और तहसीलदार पर शिकंजा
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
The snakebite compensation scam in Bilaspur has already jailed doctors, lawyers and soldiers, and now senior officials like the ADM and tehsildar are under scrutiny. The case highlights deep corruption in the compensation system.
BREAKINGChhattisgarh High Court strikes down illegal promotion rule changes / छत्तीसगढ़ हाई कोर्ट ने वन विकास निगम में पदोन्नति नियमों में बदलाव को अवैध करार दिया
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
The Chhattisgarh High Court declared the recent amendment to promotion rules at the Forest Development Corporation unlawful and set aside the merit‑based decision. This ruling restores previous norms and may lead to reinstatement of affected officers. The court emphasized strict adherence to statutory procedures.
BREAKINGHigh Court invalidates Sarpanch's residence certificate / हाई कोर्ट ने सरपंच का निवास प्रमाण पत्र अमान्य किया
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 13:18:06
छत्तीसगढ़ हाई कोर्ट ने फैसला सुनाया कि डेयरी योजना में सब्सिडी के लिए सरपंच का निवास प्रमाण पत्र मान्य नहीं है; केवल तहसीलदार का प्रमाण पत्र ही मान्य होगा। यह निर्णय दुरुपयोग को रोकने और पात्रता सत्यापन सुनिश्चित करने के लिए लिया गया है।
BREAKINGHigh Court bars tehsildar from issuing caste certificates / छत्तीसगढ़ हाई कोर्ट ने तहसीलदार को जाति प्रमाण पत्र जारी करने से रोका
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
The Chhattisgarh High Court ruled that tehsildars lack authority to issue caste certificates, emphasizing proper procedural hierarchy. This decision may affect many applicants and prompt reforms in certificate issuance processes.
Ten police officers transferred to EOW/ACB in Chhattisgarh / छत्तीसगढ़ में 10 पुलिस अधिकारियों का तबादला EOW/ACB में हुआ
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
The Chhattisgarh government transferred ten police officials to the Economic Offences Wing and Anti-Corruption Bureau on July 13, 2026. The reshuffle aims to strengthen investigative units handling financial crimes. Details of the new postings have been issued by the General Administration Department.
BREAKINGCollector orders survey, immediate cases for flood relief / बाढ़ प्रभावितों को शीघ्र राहत के लिए सर्वे और तत्काल प्रकरण
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
Collector Sanjay Agarwal ordered surveys and immediate cases to speed flood relief for affected people. The move aims to ensure swift assistance reaches victims.
BREAKINGSnake bite compensation scam worth Rs 17 crore in Bilaspur, doctors under scanner / बिलासपुर में 17 करोड़ के सर्पदंश मुआवजा घोटाले में डॉक्टर जांच में
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
A massive fraud involving Rs 17 crore in snake bite compensation claims has been uncovered in Bilaspur. The mastermind remains at large while SIMS doctors are under investigation for possible involvement.
BREAKINGChief Secretary Vikaashsheel reviews scheme implementation in high-level meeting / मुख्य सचिव विकासशील ने योजनाओं के क्रियान्वयन की समीक्षा के लिए उच्च स्तरीय बैठक की
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
Chief Secretary Vikaashsheel convened a high-level meeting with all secretaries to assess the progress of ongoing government schemes. The review aimed to ensure effective implementation and address any gaps.
BREAKINGUCC sparks political feud in MP Assembly / यूसीसी ने एमपी विधानसभा में विवाद पैदा किया; कांग्रेस ने 27% ओबीसी आरक्षण मुद्दा उठाया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
यूनीफॉर्म सिविल कोड प्रस्ताव ने मध्य प्रदेश विधानसभा में तीव्र बहस छेड़ दी, जिसमें भाजपा ने विपक्ष पर तुष्टिकरण का आरोप लगाया और कांग्रेस ने 27% ओबीसी आरक्षण की मांग की। यह टकराव सामाजिक कानून पर गहरे मतभेदों को उजागर करता है।
BREAKINGCong leader Natarajan challenges Rajya Sabha election results in HC / कांग्रेस नेता नटराजन ने राज्यसभा चुनाव परिणामों को चुनौती दी
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
A Congress leader has filed a petition in the High Court contesting the Rajya Sabha election outcome in the state. The move adds a new legal twist to the ongoing political drama surrounding the recent polls.
Mpl. Commr. Singh reviews lake restoration and monsoon preparedness / एम.पी. कमिश्नर सिंह ने झीलों के पुनरुद्धार और मानसून तैयारियों की समीक्षा की
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
Commissioner Singh inspected ongoing lake restoration projects and assessed preparedness for the monsoon season. The review aimed to ensure water bodies are cleaned and flood risks mitigated before the rains.
Gau Mata to be declared National Mother, demand for central cow slaughter law / गौमाता को राष्ट्रमाता का दर्जा और गोहत्या पर केंद्रीय कानून की मांग
Easy News · Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
Activists are pushing for Gau Mata to be recognized as a national mother and for a unified central law banning cow slaughter. A six‑phase nationwide campaign will be launched to rally support for these demands.
BREAKINGMadhya Pradesh tables UCC Bill in House / मध्य प्रदेश ने विधानसभा में यूसीसी बिल पेश किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Madhya Pradesh government has introduced the Uniform Civil Code Bill in the assembly, aiming to implement a common civil law for all citizens. The move follows nationwide discussions, and the bill is now under consideration.
Putin meets North Korean Foreign Minister Hui / पुतिन ने उत्तर कोरिया के विदेश मंत्री ह्यूई से मुलाकात की
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Russian President Vladimir Putin held talks with North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son-hui, discussing bilateral relations and regional issues. The meeting underscored cooperation between Moscow and Pyongyang amid ongoing geopolitical tensions. No specific agreements were announced yet.
HEALTH2
Waste motor oil turned into dengue prevention tool by municipal corporation / बेकार मोबिल ऑयल से डेंगू बचाव का हथियार, नगर निगम ने अभियान शुरू
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
The municipal corporation has launched a campaign to convert used motor oil into a dengue control measure, aiming to reduce breeding sites and protect residents. This innovative approach repurposes hazardous waste for public health benefit.
BREAKINGIllegal clinic operating near CMHO office raises health department concerns / सीएमएचओ कार्यालय के पास झोलाछाप क्लिनिक, स्वास्थ्य विभाग की भूमिका पर सवाल
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
A unlicensed clinic was found operating close to the Chief Medical and Health Officer’s office in Bilaspur, prompting scrutiny of the health department’s oversight. The discovery highlights systemic lapses in regulating medical facilities. Authorities have initiated inspections and promised stricter enforcement.
INFRASTRUCTURE7
Bus services halted in Ansupmar Tiger Reserve, students stranded on bridge for 4 hours / अचानकमार टाइगर रिजर्व में बसें रुकीं, स्कूली छात्र 4 घंटे पुल पर फंसे रहे
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
A bridge closure in Ansupmar Tiger Reserve stopped several buses carrying school students, leaving them stranded for about four hours. The incident highlights safety and connectivity concerns in the reserve area. Local authorities are working to restore normal traffic.
BREAKING20 killed in Sikkim tunnel collapse / सिक्किम सुरंग ढहने से 20 मरे
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
A tunnel under construction in Sikkim collapsed, killing 20 workers, highlighting safety concerns in infrastructure projects. Authorities have launched a rescue and investigation operation.
BREAKINGCommuting in East Nagpur proving a perilous task / पूर्व नागपुर में आवागमन खतरनाक कार्य साबित हो रहा है
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
पूर्व नागपुर में निवासी खराब सड़कों और यातायात खतरों के कारण खतरनाक आवागमन का सामना कर रहे हैं। यह स्थिति दैनिक यात्रियों के लिए जोखिम पैदा करती है और तुरंत बुनियादी ढांचे की मरम्मत की आवश्यकता को रेखांकित करती है।
BREAKINGMassive cave‑ins and water logging plague Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में बड़े पैमाने पर गुफाओं के धंसने और जलभराव की समस्या
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
Recent heavy rains caused extensive sinkholes and waterlogging across Bilaspur, creating deep craters and disrupting traffic. Authorities are working to clear debris and repair affected areas to restore normalcy.
BREAKINGSix, including three of a family, charred to death in accident on Samruddhi E’way / समृद्धि ई-वे पर दुर्घटना में छह लोग, जिनमें तीन परिवार के सदस्य थे, जलकर मारे गए
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
A tragic accident on the Samruddhi E-way resulted in six fatalities, three of them family members, after their vehicle caught fire. The incident underscores the need for improved road safety measures and emergency response.
State approves Kanhan link for Nagpur Metro Phase‑2, Rs 310.35 cr tender / राज्य ने नागपुर मेट्रो फेज 2 के कांहन लिंक को मंजूरी दी, 310.35 करोड़ की निविदा
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
The state government has cleared the Kanhan link for the second phase of Nagpur Metro, with a Rs 310.35 crore tender process set to begin shortly.
BREAKINGHeavy rain damages hundreds of quintals of grain in Bilaspur ration shops / मूसलाधार बारिश से बिलासपुर की दर्जनों राशन दुकानों में अनाज खराब
G News Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
Musaladhar rain destroyed hundreds of quintals of grain stored in dozens of ration shops in Bilaspur, causing huge losses. Authorities are assessing damage and planning relief measures.
INSTAGRAM NEWS3
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Itwari–Madhupur Shravani Mela special train for Baidyanath Dham from Aug 1 / बाबाधाम जाने वालों के लिए 1 अगस्त से इतवारी–मधुपुर श्रावणी मेला स्पेशल ट्रेन
A special train will operate from Itwari to Madhupur for the Shravani Mela, offering pilgrims easier access to Baidyanath Dham starting 1 August. This service aims to ease the journey for devotees heading to the temple.
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Chaiturgarh temple ramp damaged by heavy rain, vehicle access blocked / भारी बारिश से चैतुरगढ़ मंदिर का रैम्प क्षतिग्रस्त, वाहनों की आवाजाही पर रोक
Heavy rains have damaged the ramp at Chaiturgarh temple, forcing authorities to block vehicle access until repairs are completed. The damage highlights the need for better drainage and maintenance.
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Multiple MEMU and passenger trains cancelled on 22‑23 July, check status before travel / 22-23 जुलाई को कई मेमू और पैसेंजर ट्रेनें रद्द, यात्रा से पहले स्थिति जाँचें
Several MEMU and passenger trains have been cancelled for 22‑23 July, urging travelers to verify train status before planning their journeys. The cancellations are due to ongoing maintenance and weather-related disruptions.
NEWS7
Monsoon returns, orange-yellow alerts issued across Chhattisgarh / मानसून फिर सक्रिय, कई जिलों में ऑरेंज-यलो अलर्ट जारी
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
Monsoon has regained speed in Chhattisgarh, prompting orange and yellow alerts in multiple districts. Weather officials warn of heavy rainfall in the coming days.

BREAKINGUkraine fires over 400 drones at Russian capital / यूक्रेन ने रूसी राजधानी पर 400 से अधिक ड्रोन दागे
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Ukraine launched more than 400 drones toward Moscow, striking various targets in the Russian capital region. The attack reflects escalating hostilities following the prolonged conflict. Russian defenses reported intercepting some drones, but damage details are still emerging.
OTHER2
Indian Grey Wolf spotted in Bastar, highlighting hidden biodiversity / भारतीय ग्रे भेड़िये की बस्तार में sighting ने छिपी जैव विविधता को उजागर किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
The rare Indian Grey Wolf was reportedly seen in Bastar, marking possibly the first documented sighting. The event draws attention to the region’s rich but under‑known wildlife heritage.

POLICE29
BREAKINGTeak smuggling bust in Bilaspur, four arrested / बिलासपुर में सागौन तस्करी, चार गिरफ्तार
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 04:58:45
Forest Development Corporation seized a pickup loaded with teak logs in Bhainsajhar, Bilaspur, arresting four smugglers. The operation highlights ongoing efforts to curb illegal timber trafficking in the region.
BREAKINGFather kills son after drunken rampage in Takhatpur / तखतपुर में नशे में बेटे की हत्या
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 04:58:45
In Takhatpur, a father, intoxicated, killed his own son following a drunken rampage, later confessing to police. The incident has shocked the local community and prompted calls for stricter alcohol control.
One goon per youth' policy to monitor criminals: New preventive policing in Bilaspur range / 'एक गुंडा एक जवान' नीति से बदमाशों पर नजर, बिलासपुर रेंज में लागू
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
Bilaspur police launch a new preventive policing scheme pairing a youth with each known criminal to keep an eye on potential threats. The initiative aims to deter crime through close surveillance and community involvement.
Drunk driver ordered to clean police station for a month / शराब पीकर गाड़ी चलाने वाले को अनोखी सजा, एक महीने तक थाने की सफाई करेगा
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
A court in Janjgir-Champa gave a unique penalty to a drunk driver, ordering him to clean the police station for a month and raise public awareness about drunk driving. This creative punishment aims to deter future offenses and promote community responsibility.
BREAKINGTractor overturn kills two, injures six workers in Hirri / हिर्री में धान रोपाई के लिए जा रहे श्रमिकों से भरी ट्रैक्टर-ट्रॉली पलटी, दो की मौत, छह घायल
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
A tractor carrying paddy planting workers overturned in Hirri, resulting in two fatalities and six injuries. The injured have been taken to hospital, and police have initiated a rescue and investigation.
BREAKINGAuto passenger’s daughter killed in bike crash / मस्तूरी में दर्दनाक हादसा, बाइक की टक्कर से सात साल की बच्ची की मौत
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
A seven‑year‑old girl died after a speeding bike collided with the auto‑rickshaw in which her mother was sitting to hand over money. The tragic accident underscores road safety issues and prompted a police investigation.
BREAKINGTwo cops arrested in snakebite fraud, SSP reveals / सर्पदंश फर्जीवाड़े में दो पुलिसकर्मी गिरफ्तार, SSP रजनेश सिंह ने किया खुलासा
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 08:11:42
Two police personnel were arrested in connection with the snakebite compensation fraud, SSP Rajnesh Singh disclosed. The arrests are part of a widening investigation that has already implicated several officials.
BREAKINGTractor overturns in Medapar, killing two women laborers / मेडपार में ट्रैक्टर पलटने से दो महिला मजदूरों की मौत
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
Two women laborers died and several were injured when a fast-moving tractor overturned while rice transplanting in Medapar village, Takhatpur. The incident highlights unsafe working conditions for migrant workers.
BREAKINGFather kills son with axe after daily dispute / रोज के विवाद से तंग आकर पिता ने कुल्हाड़ी से बेटे की हत्या
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
A father in Kushmuli village killed his son with an axe after a prolonged daily dispute, ending their patience. Police have registered a case and are investigating the motive.
BREAKINGTransgender murder in Sakri, body dumped in paddy field / सकरी में किन्नर की हत्या कर धान के खेत में फेंकी लाश
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 13:18:06
सकरी में एक किन्नर की उसके ही साथी द्वारा हत्या कर दी गई और शव को धान के खेत में फेंक दिया गया। यह घटना क्षेत्र में किन्नरों के बीच बढ़ती हिंसा को उजागर करती है। पुलिस ने आरोपियों की गिरफ्तारी के लिए जाँच शुरू कर दी है।
Police to monitor immigrants' entry, SP meets hotel owners / पुलिस प्रवासियों की एंट्री पर नजर रखेगी, एसपी ने संचालकों की बैठक ली
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 13:18:06
जांजगीर-चांपा के एसपी ने होटल और लॉज संचालकों को प्रवासियों की निगरानी करने और संदिग्ध गतिविधियों की सूचना देने का निर्देश दिया। यह कदम जिला सुरक्षा को मजबूत करने और अवैध प्रवेश को रोकने के लिए उठाया गया है। नियमित समन्वय बैठकें आयोजित की जाएँगी।
BREAKINGTractor overturns, two women die, many injured / ट्रैक्टर पलटा, रोपा लगाने जा रहे दो महिलाओं की मौत, कई घायल
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 13:18:06
बिलासपुर जिले के हिर्री थाना क्षेत्र में रोपा लगाने जा रहे मजदूरों से भरा ट्रैक्टर पलट गया, जिसमें दो महिलाओं की मौत हो गई और कई अन्य घायल हो गए। घायलों को तुरंत अस्पताल ले जाया गया और पुलिस ने दुर्घटना की जाँच शुरू कर दी है।
BREAKINGFather kills son over motorcycle dispute / पिता ने मोटरसाइकिल विवाद के बाद बेटे की जान ले ली
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
In Kusmuli village, a father fatally assaulted his son following a dispute over a motorcycle, resulting in the son's death. The incident highlights rising domestic violence and the need for conflict resolution. Police have registered a case and are investigating.
BREAKINGEx-lover hacks woman's WhatsApp to leak private videos / प्यार टूटने के बाद साइबर शिकारी बनकर युवती का व्हाट्सएप हैक किया
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
A young woman in Bilaspur had her WhatsApp account compromised by a former boyfriend, who leaked edited private videos to ruin her reputation. The incident underscores the dangers of cyberstalking and the need for stronger digital safety measures. Authorities are investigating the breach.
BREAKINGPolice arrest kinner murder suspect within hours / गुरु-चेला विवाद में किन्नर की हत्या, आरोपी गिरफ्तार
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
In Bilaspur, a kinner named Tanni Khan was killed amid a guru-chela dispute, prompting swift police action. The accused was apprehended within hours, reflecting rapid response.
BREAKINGTransgender killed over disputed statement in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में विवाद के बाद किन्नर की गला दबाकर हत्या
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
A transgender person was murdered in Bilaspur after a dispute over his statement claiming he had no guru. Police have launched an investigation into the killing.
BREAKINGSC upholds life sentence for Raipur man who burned wife alive / सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने रायपुर के अजय ठाकुर की उम्रकैद बरकरार रखी
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
The Supreme Court denied relief to Ajay Thakur, upholding his life imprisonment for murdering his wife by burning her alive. The verdict ends his appeals in the brutal case.
IG introduces zero tolerance plan, assigning officers to track criminals in Bilaspur / आईजी ने बिलासपुर में अपराधियों पर शिकंजा कसने के लिए जीरो टॉलरेंस प्लान शुरू किया
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
IG Ram Gopal Garg introduced a zero tolerance policy assigning a dedicated officer to each criminal in Bilaspur. The move aims to make it harder for offenders to evade capture.
Police bust illegal hookah bar in Bilaspur's Business Bihar / बिलासपुर के व्यापार विहार में अवैध हुक्का बार पर पुलिस की रेड
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 17:08:07
Civil Line police uncovered an illegal hookah bar operating in Bilaspur's Business Bihar, cracking down on violations of smoking laws. The raid highlights ongoing efforts to curb unauthorized entertainment venues.
Police crack down on illegal hookah bar in Byapar Vihar, operator on the run / बिलासपुर पुलिस ने व्यापार विहार में अवैध हुक्का बार पर छापा, संचालक फरार
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 19:03:57
In a major anti‑drug operation, Bilaspur police raided a clandestine hookah bar in Byapar Vihar and uncovered illegal tobacco trade. The bar’s operator escaped, prompting a manhunt by authorities.
SOCIAL4
Honest soul returns 2kg silver kettle after 24h search / इंदौर में ईमानदारी, 2 किलो चांदी का लोटा वापस
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 22 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-22 04:58:45
A resident of Indore found a 2‑kg silver kettle in garbage, searched for 24 hours, and returned it to its owner. The act of honesty was praised and highlighted moral values in the city.
BREAKINGJanadarshan reveals public woes: justice, jobs, compensation demanded / जनदर्शन में लोगों की समस्याएं उजागर, इंसाफ, रोजगार, मुआवजे की मांग
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 11:43:55
The Janadarshan event at Bilaspur’s district office highlighted diverse public grievances, including demands for justice, employment, and compensation for destroyed homes. Officials listened and promised to address the issues. The session underscored the need for swift grievance redressal.
BREAKINGGuru-chela dispute ends in eunuch murder, arrests made / गुरु-चेला विवाद, किन्नर की हत्या, कुछ गिरफ्तार
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 21 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-21 19:03:57
A dispute over the traditional guru‑chela relationship in Bilaspur escalated into a violent murder of a transgender person. Police have arrested several suspects, while the community is outraged over the killing.
Protest infiltration: Some people pushed own agenda at CJP rally / कुछ लोगों ने सीजेपी प्रदर्शन में घुसकर अपना एजेंडा आगे बढ़ाया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-22 08:07:13
According to reports, individuals infiltrated the CJP protest to advance their own agenda. This raises concerns about protest integrity and potential manipulation of public demonstrations.

Illegal pesticide stash seized from hotel in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर के होटल से अवैध कीटनाशक का बड़ा जखीरा जब्त
Authorities raided a hotel in Bilaspur and uncovered a massive illegal stockpile of pesticides, leading to its seizure. The operation highlights ongoing efforts to curb unauthorized chemical trade. Investigation is underway to identify those involved.

The brutal murder of Tanni, a kinner, has ignited strong anger among the community, demanding justice and faster police action.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
Children forced to sweep at Belghana govt school / बेलगहना के सरकारी स्कूल में बच्चों से झाड़ू लगवाया गया
At Belghana government school, students were made to sweep the premises, raising concerns over child labor and school discipline.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
Encroachment disrupts tehsil parking / तहसील परिसर की पार्किंग पर अतिक्रमण से व्यवस्था बाधित
Alleged encroachment on the tehsil complex parking area has caused severe disruption to official operations. Authorities are reportedly struggling to restore order and manage the blocked access.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-21 | Scraped: 2026-07-21 15:32:40
Congress questions compensation politics / मुआवजे पर सियासत तेज, कांग्रेस ने उठाए सवाल
The debate over compensation has intensified, with Congress demanding clarity on the distribution and criteria. The political confrontation highlights concerns about transparency and fairness in the compensation process.
